hero_subtitle: SFTY provides compliance teams with a centralized dashboard to monitor transaction screening, orchestrate KYT reviews, and manage alert triage with audit-ready decision logs and case workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when transaction reviews fragment
problem_description: Operations teams face delays and duplicated effort when transaction monitoring and KYT outputs remain disconnected across multiple providers. This fragmentation weakens risk visibility, complicates alert triage and creates gaps in audit-ready evidence for review and reporting.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYT and provider alerts, risk scores, review actions and decision logs into a unified workflow that streamlines transaction monitoring for faster triage and audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From transaction alerts to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates transaction monitoring alerts and KYT signals then routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One review-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects transaction monitoring and KYT outputs into structured workflows, decision logs, cases and evidence to streamline compliance reviews and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured transaction screening, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment to support scalable, traceable compliance workflows and bank due diligence readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support transaction monitoring and KYT review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction alerts route into case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence for reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider orchestration supports multi-source KYT analysis
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected workflow platform that connects transaction monitoring, KYT, onboarding, Travel Rule and case management into one operational compliance control layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support transaction monitoring workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures transaction screening and KYT alerts into risk-based review workflows, automating alert triage, case creation, decision logging and escalation within a consolidated compliance dashboard.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready transaction evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves transaction screening history, decision logs, linked alerts and case evidence to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection preparations without altering source provider data.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without requiring replacement or disruption of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace providers; it aggregates and orchestrates their outputs into structured, auditable workflows to reduce manual effort and improve compliance traceability.
final_title: Connect transaction monitoring into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes KYT alerts, transaction screening outputs and case management in one operational dashboard.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
